CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Entry Of Stipulated Judgment
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Jennifer McGlone of the Holland Law, tel. No. 1-415-200-4983 appearing for the
Plaintiff;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Stephen Gould Corporation's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Stipulated Judgment signed in openn court. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Continued To Jul-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipluated Judgement
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer McGlone, Esq. of Holland Law, T:415.200.4983, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF STEPHEN GOULD CORPORATION'S Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgement is DENIED. Although the motion was not opposed, it must be denied as procedurally improper. There is no California procedure that permits entry of a stipulated judgment that is not made in conformity with the confession of judgment rules and/or is not amenable to summary enforcement per CCP 664.6. The stipulation for judgment entered into by the parties neither complies with the strict requirements for a valid confession of judgment nor was it entered into in a pending case to fall within the scope of section 664.6. Plaintiff's remedy is to sue for breach of contract and either obtain a default judgment if the defendant does not appear or seek entry of judgment by a motion for summary judgment or at trial.

Counsel for the plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
